summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QuizHub critical bug fixes - verified WebSocket stability, admin functionality, and backend APIs. All critical bug fixes appear to be working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns JSON status ok with version 1.0.0 and player_count
POST /api/join creates player with valid nickname and returns player_id
POST /api/join returns 400 for empty nicknames
GET /api/players returns array of current players
POST /api/game/start starts game and returns question state with current_question
POST /api/answer processes answers correctly with score calculation
POST /api/answer returns 409 conflict for duplicate answers
GET /api/leaderboard returns sorted player entries with ranks
POST /api/game/next advances to next question or finishes game
POST /api/game/reset resets game to lobby state
POST /api/admin/auth with correct PIN '1234' returns admin token
POST /api/admin/auth with wrong PIN returns 401 unauthorized
Admin-protected endpoints return 401 without valid X-Admin-Token
POST /api/admin/timer sets timer with valid admin token
GET /api/categories returns list of question categories
POST /api/questions/add adds question with valid admin token
POST /api/questions/delete removes question with valid admin token
WebSocket /api/ws endpoint accepts connections without 'response does not implement http.Hijacker' error
CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Admin panel WebSocket connects and stays connected (no reconnect loop)
CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Admin panel loads at /admin.html with stable WebSocket connection
CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Admin PIN authentication with '1234' unlocks dashboard successfully
CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Admin dashboard shows game controls with real-time status updates
CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Admin can start games and advance questions via WebSocket
CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: WebSocket status shows 'Connected' with green dot consistently
CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: No WebSocket reconnection attempts detected during 10-second monitoring
Frontend: Player join screen loads correctly with nickname input and Join Game button
Frontend: Player can join games and receive player_id successfully
Frontend: Game state transitions work (join -> question screen when game active)
Frontend: Question screen displays with timer, options, category, and question counter
Frontend: Question progression shows 'Question X of 15' format correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (18/18 API endpoints working including all admin functionality)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (player join, question display, admin panel all working)
success_percentage.admin_features: 100% (PIN auth, game controls, question management, WebSocket stability)
